<script>
$( document ).ready(function() {
    $('.hero-slider').owlCarousel({
        items: 1,
        autoplay: true,
        autoplayTimeout: 8000,
        animateIn: 'fadeIn',
        slideBy: 1,
        dots: true,
        arrows: false,
        loop: true,
        animateOut: 'fadeOut'
    });
});
 
</script>

Enjoy up to $25 Off Shipping When You Spend $200+ Online

    Shop store.mopar.ca 12/9 – 12/19 and save up to $25 on shipping on qualifying orders with promo code DECSHIP25 [*] Eligibility Requirements: Not all items sold on store.mopar.ca are shippable. Promotion valid only on online orders of shippable items with a minimum order value of $200, made from 12/09/2025 through 12/19/2025. Offer code DECSHIP25 must be applied at checkout. Promotion covers up to $25 of the total shipping fee; any remaining shipping fee balance is the sole responsibility of the customer. No cash value. Void where prohibited. Other restrictions may apply.

    Shop Now

    bproauto parts now available

    bproauto parts are O.E. - backed, quality-tested aftermarket parts for most makes and models. They are competitively priced, readily available and warranty-backed.

    Shop Now

    JEEP PERFORMANCE PARTS ANNOUNCES NEW 2-INCH LIFT KITS FEATURING BILSTEIN SHOCKS

    Legendary Jeep® 4x4 capability reaches new levels in Wrangler and Gladiator models with Jeep Performance Parts 2-inch lift kits developed by Jeep brand engineers and off-road enthusiasts taking its legendary 4x4 Wrangler and Gladiator capability to a higher level.

    Shop Now

    Welcome to the Official Mopar® eStore

    We're your trusted source for the genuine parts and accessories you need to spruce up your Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep®, Ram Trucks, or FIAT® vehicle. Find everything you want, in-stock and ready to ship.

    Shop Now

    CHARGE YOUR ADVENTURE

    The Free2Move Charge Level 2 charging station can deliver a full charge in as little as two hours. This system has Energy Star Certification, and is compact, lightweight and can accommodate either plug-in or hardwired installation. It is also weatherproofed for outdoor or indoor charging.

    Shop Now

    Capable Jeep® Brand Parts & Accessories

    Life is an adventure with your Jeep® Brand vehicle. Authentic Jeep Brand parts and accessories are made to measure which means you can keep exploring the world around you in style and comfort.

    Shop Now

    Dodge Performance Parts & Accessories

    To consistently get the most out of your Dodge Performance vehicle use the original high quality parts and accessories that are designed for your model.

    Shop Now

    Durable Ram Truck Parts & Accessories

    Powerful Ram Trucks are built to take on the toughest tasks. When it's time to replace or upgrade something on your truck, you can depend on these genuine Mopar® parts and accessories to do the job.

    Shop Now

    Trustworthy Chrysler Parts and Accessories

    The Chrysler brand is known for automotive innovations. Explore our selection of authentic OEM parts and accessories. They're all guaranteed to fit and perform the way you want!

    Shop Now
